Analyst: Intrusion successful. Three electric shocks absorbed without interrupting the operation. Notable.
Access obtained despite a physical countermeasure that should have stopped any attempt.
Connection established after exposure to an active security lock. No slowdown observed.
Data retrieved. I record: the operator's physical resilience offset a hostile system.
Diplomat: The system opened up... after resisting with everything it had. He never let go either.
Access granted, despite the obvious pain he went through to get there. True determination.
We're in. This system really didn't want to give in, but neither was he going to give up.
The digital door opened after a long, silent struggle. He held on to the end.
Sentinel: Intrusion validated. Note: operator sustained an active countermeasure without interrupting the task.
Access obtained despite a physical defense mechanism. Endurance deemed off the charts.
The system gave way after prolonged resistance the operator managed to absorb.
Connection established. Report: resilience directly responsible for the operation continuing.
Explorer: It shocked me like twice and I just kept going like nothing happened. We're in.
The system fought back hard, but I take a hit pretty well, apparently.
I took a jolt that should have sent me flying. Still standing, still working.
That hurt, a lot. But I kept going, and here's the result.

Analyst: Intrusion failed. Even high endurance has a limit against repeated countermeasures.
The firewall held. The operator's physical resilience delayed the failure, without preventing it.
Connection blocked after prolonged exposure to an active defense system.
Attempt aborted. I record: perseverance alone wasn't enough to get past this lock.
Diplomat: The system rejected me... but he held on well after most would have given up.
Access denied, despite all his effort and resilience. Some systems never give in.
The digital door stayed shut. He gave everything, and it still wasn't enough.
The data wouldn't let itself be approached, despite remarkable endurance on his part.
Sentinel: Intrusion failed. Logging: prolonged resistance that ultimately didn't change the outcome.
Access denied. Report: repeated countermeasures eventually exceeded the tolerance threshold.
The system blocked the attempt after prolonged exposure to the defense system.
Connection impossible. I recommend reinforced protective equipment for the next attempt.
Explorer: I took a bunch of shocks, but at some point the system just won. Ouch.
I usually handle shocks fine. That one was really too much.
I kept going well after I should have stopped. Result: it eventually got the better of me.
It knocked me flat, literally. Good fight anyway.
